Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The user wants me to merge two event logs Log A and Log B into a single integrated event log Let me analyze the requirements and the data provided

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Requirements Analysis 1 Log A is the primary timeline but timestamps may reflect received time not when they started 2 Log B has richer attributes user_id resource_id notes 3 Timestamps may be offset by a few seconds tolerance mentioned as less than 2 seconds 4 Event names may differ 5 Some events may be in one log but not the other 6 Match based on order_id plus event timing 7 If matched merge attributes handle timestamp differences select primary or include both 8 If not matched leave separate with origin indicator 9 Final output chronological order document reasoning

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait I need to reconsider the Payment event Is it possible that PaymentCheck in Log B is actually a different event from Payment Processed in Log A

Text: In Log B PaymentCheck comes before Quality Check and in Log A Payment Processed comes before Item Shipped Quality Check in B fits between Payment and Shipping in Log As timeline So they align temporally in the sequence even if the exact timestamps differ by 5 seconds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
